_comment: Round 9 MoE + 16GB-VRAM dense comparator round. Five candidates at default 2048 cap, thinking-off where applicable. Purpose: determine whether smaller MoE (qwen3:30b-a3b vs Qwen 35B-A3B) or other-architecture MoE (mixtral:8x7b) is sufficient, AND whether dense 12-14B models land within +/-0.3 of gpt-oss dynamic 2048 baseline (3.31 HF0) which would unlock the RAG-augmented-small-model production architecture.
_recommended_sequence: ollama pull qwen3:8b ; ollama pull gemma3:12b ; ollama pull qwen3:14b ; ollama pull qwen3:30b-a3b ; ollama pull mixtral:8x7b
score each exact timestamped raw with prompts/test_suite_v0.3.json
_baseline_policy: Apples-to-apples comparison with gpt-oss dynamic 2048 baseline (3.31 HF0). All models at default 2048 cap, thinking-off where applicable. NOT directly comparable to maxtok8k diagnostic rounds (Qwen 3.77, gpt-oss 3.23) - separate budget axis.
_policy: Use default KV / default flash_attention for this round (env unset, verified at start).
Thinking-off for Qwen3 family via reasoning_effort='none'.
Gemma3 and Mixtral are non-thinking models, no reasoning_effort override.
Label discipline: results comparable to gpt-oss dynamic 2048 baseline; NOT comparable to maxtok8k diagnostic rounds (separate budget axis).

models.label: qwen3-8b
models._role: dense floor - smallest Qwen3 dense, thinking-off

models.label: gemma3-12b
models._role: dense 12B Korean-strong - tests dense-model RAG-architecture decision trigger

models.label: qwen3-14b
models._role: dense 14B Qwen family - direct in-family comparator vs 8b and 30b-a3b

models.label: qwen3-30b-a3b
models._role: MoE small Qwen sibling - is smaller MoE sufficient vs 35b-a3b?

models.label: mixtral-8x7b
models._role: MoE different architecture - 8 experts x 7B, non-Qwen MoE comparator
